active: The competent programmer wrote complex code that successfully met the project requirements.

Complex code was written by the competent programmer to meet the project requirements. 

Note: Each active sentence should contain a different action, object, and context, while each passive sentence should have a different object performing the action, with the agent (the person or thing doing the action) appearing last in the sentence. Ensure these are all distinct from each other. To make it more challenging, include at least one sentence where 'by' appears before the agent.

Here are ten additional pairs of sentences demonstrating "Agent Demotion":
